mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_INFO SET IS_RELEASE = #{isRelease}, RELEASE_REMARK = #{releaseRemark} WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, IS_RELEASE, RELEASE_REMARK FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ID = #{id}
select count(*) from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC left join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on TBT.id = TBTC.TRUST_ID where TBT.TYPE in ('疏港','陆销','装船') and TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{id}
